WeaponTraitDef.label: quick magazine
WeaponTraitDef.description: This magazine uses an improved release mechanism. Reloads are faster, so downtime is shorter.

WeaponTraitDef.label: extended magazine
WeaponTraitDef.description: This magazine holds more ammo than the standard version, letting the weapon fire more shots per burst.

WeaponTraitDef.label: belt magazine
WeaponTraitDef.description: This belt feed provides a steady stream of ammo, allowing longer and more suppressive bursts.

WeaponTraitDef.label: drum magazine
WeaponTraitDef.description: This high-capacity drum holds far more ammo, allowing long and heavy bursts.
